text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
If only I could speak with just a little<n>more
oomph... Well, practice makes<n>perfect, so here
goes.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: She sells seashells... by the seashore.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, that went quite nicely. Surely I<n>must have
beaten the time I recorded<n>yesterday...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Oh dear, I forgot to time it.
